api_key.name: API Key
api_key.hint: Your DeepSeek API Key, get it from https://platform.deepseek.com/

zh.name: API 密钥
zh.hint: 你的 DeepSeek API 密钥，从 https://platform.deepseek.com/ 获取

headers.name: Custom Headers
headers.hint: Custom headers passed to OpenAI Client

zh.name: 自定义请求头
zh.hint: 传递给 OpenAI 客户端的自定义请求头

temperature.name: 温度
temperature.hint: 模型温度（注意：思考模式下此参数不生效）

en.name: Temperature
en.hint: Model temperature (Note: this parameter does not apply in thinking mode)

thinking_enabled.name: 思考模式
thinking_enabled.hint: 开启 DeepSeek 思考模式，模型将先输出思维链再给出最终回答

en.name: Thinking Mode
en.hint: Enable DeepSeek thinking mode, the model will output the thinking chain before giving the final answer

reasoning_effort.name: 思考深度
reasoning_effort.hint: 思考强度：high（默认）或 max（复杂 Agent 任务推荐）

en.name: Reasoning Effort
en.hint: Reasoning intensity: high (default) or max (recommended for complex Agent tasks)
